title: Using Workform for Project Intake
excerpt: Hi! I’m exploring how Monday.com can automate our project intake process, which currently uses Google Forms. I noticed we can integrate Google Forms with Monday.com or create a Workform within Monday.com. With Workform, …

posts.author: jeanemicaller (Jeane Micaller)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’m exploring how Monday.com can automate our project intake process, which currently uses Google Forms. I noticed we can integrate Google Forms with Monday.com or create a Workform within Monday.com. With Workform, does a requester need a Monday.com account to submit a project via Workform?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jeane Micaller

To automate your project intake process, we can integrate Google Forms with Monday.com or create a Workform within Monday.com. Integrating Google Forms is straightforward and allows you to maintain your current setup while syncing data to Monday.com automatically. On the other hand, creating a Workform within Monday.com offers a more seamless experience as it’s fully integrated within the Monday ecosystem, making data management and workflow automation smoother.

With Workform, a requester does not need a Monday.com account to submit a project. This feature is designed to be user-friendly, enabling external users to fill out the form without the need for login credentials, ensuring a hassle-free submission process.
